snippet.title: DAVID RADOSAVLJEVIC x DRIA - DIOR (Official Video)
snippet.description:
DAVID RADOSAVLJEVIC x DRIA - DIOR
David i Dria Booking & info: +38163606609 Sasa Matejic

Muzika: Neven IN VIVO
Tekst: Neven IN VIVO
Aranzman: Patriarch
Mix i Master: TOZLA

Video by Visual Fever
https://www.instagram.com/visual.fever.studio

Specijalno hvala event centru Club City Hall na nesebicnoj pomoci pri realizaciji spota
https://www.instagram.com/clubcityhall

https://www.instagram.com/radosavljevicdavid

Dria instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/_dria.1_

Patriarch instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/patriarch_x6x

Tozla instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/tozla

Neven IN VIVO instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/neven_invivo

Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Volim kako zvuci uzdah mog imena, s tvojih toplih usana,
Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Kad mi tiho kazes sta da ti radim ja,
Benzin preko plamena.

Sa tobom sve je rulet, od milke do nule,
Brze nego Tesla S, ej
Tako ti je sa princezama, voli kad je vezana,
Pssst, Samo niko da ne cuje.

Ele ele ele ele
Ko bi reko da je mala ziva vatra.
Ele ele
Njene misli koje skriva nocu gresnije od pakla.

Subota uvece, susi, Buddha bar,
Leti ide se na Rodos,
Zivi zivot mala kao da je superstar,
Mamin i tatin je ponos.

Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Volim kako zvuci uzdah mog imena, s tvojih toplih usana,
Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Kad mi tiho kazes sta da ti radim ja,
Benzin preko plamena.

Mala moze casove da daje,
Kada igra opasna je,
I svi kazu aj jaj jaj jaj,

Nocas lepa je ko Raj,
Kukovima uvija,
I svi kazu samo aj jaj jaj

Subota uvece, susi, Buddha bar,
Leti ide se na Rodos,
Zivi zivot mala kao da je superstar,
Mamin i tatin je ponos.

Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Volim kako zvuci uzdah mog imena, s tvojih toplih usana,

Kada igra opasna je,
I svi kazu aj jaj jaj jaj,

Nocas lepa je ko Raj,
Kukovima uvija,
I svi kazu samo aj jaj jaj

Subota uvece, susi, Buddha bar,
Leti ide se na Rodos,
Zivi zivot mala kao da je superstar,
Mamin i tatin je ponos.

Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Volim kako zvuci uzdah mog imena, s tvojih toplih usana,
Skinucu ti taj Dior, s ramena s ramena,
Kad mi tiho kazes sta da ti radim ja,
Benzin preko plamena.

Yaman Kؤ±rؤ±mlؤ± is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherâ€™s death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewâ€¦ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleâ€™s arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kؤ±rؤ±mlؤ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kؤ±rؤ±mlؤ± mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

Yaman Kؤ±rؤ±mlؤ± is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherâ€™s death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewâ€¦ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleâ€™s arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kؤ±rؤ±mlؤ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kؤ±rؤ±mlؤ± mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

Zbog ؤچega se film pre zvaniؤچne bioskopske premijere u Srbiji zakazane za 22. april kada se obeleإ¾ava 76 godina od proboja poslednjih zarobljenika iz logora Jasenovac, prikazuje na televiziji? U kojoj meri su negativni prikazi bili opreteؤ‡enje za film u kontekstu trke za oskarovsku nominaciju? Zbog ؤچega "Dara iz Jasenovca" izaziva reakcije i napade onih koji relativizuju zloؤچine? snippet.title: Watch NASAâ€™s Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover â€“ the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space â€“ search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASAâ€™s Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

snippet.title: RIJEKA vs HAJDUK 0:1 (23.kolo, HT Prva liga 20/21)
snippet.description:
U novom Jadranskom derbiju, susretu 23. kola HT Prve lige, Hajduk je s 1:0 pobijedio Rijeku na Rujevici.

Posljednja ligaإ،ka utakmica Hajduka bila je ona prije dva i pol tjedna baإ، na Rujevici, a i tada su Spliؤ‡ani slavili s minimalnih 1:0 (zaostali susret).

No, ovaj put je Hajduk ostavio mnogo bolji dojam, a u premijeri je Marko Livaja pokazao kako ؤ‡e biti veliko pojaؤچanje Hajduka. Mnogo toga je pokazao i Kaؤچanikliؤ‡, takoؤ‘er novi igraؤچ na Poljudu, koji je uإ،ao u igru u drugom poluvremenu.

Igralo se otvoreno s obje strane, no Hajduk je kao rijetko kada ove sezone djelovao vrlo organizirano i konkretno. Livaja je bio sjajan u igri prema naprijed, dok je dva gola Umuta Nayira poniإ،tio VAR. No, u 73. minuti je Turؤچin zabio i treؤ‡i put, na odliؤچnu asistenciju Livaje, إ،to je bio gol odluke.

Rijeka je potom nasrnula na suparnika i u 96. minuti dobila idealnu priliku za izjednaؤچenje. Andrijaإ،eviؤ‡ je izveo jedanaesterac, ali je Kaliniؤ‡ obranio i saؤچuvao Hajduku tri boda.

Hajduk je Rijeci doإ،ao na samo tri boda zaostatka, a ima i odigranu utakmicu manje.

HT Prva liga, 23. kolo: Rijeka - Hajduk 0:1 (Umut Nayir 73.)

snippet.title: SpaceX Starship Rocket Explodes After Landing
snippet.description: Mar.03 -- Space Exploration Technologies Corp.â€™s newest and biggest rocket pulled off its first successful landing, then exploded a brief time later and was engulfed by fire. The rocket flew to an altitude of about 10 kilometers (around 6 miles) before turning its engines back on and settling on the landing pad with a slight lean. It then exploded.

snippet.title: Vladika Porfirije pjeva ؤچetniؤچke pjesme
snippet.description:
Novi patrijarh SPC-a Porfirije, do danas mitropolit zagrebaؤچko-ljubljanski osvanuo je prije pet godina na video snimku, kako u zanimljivom druإ،tvu pjeva ؤچetniؤچku pjesmu posveؤ‡enu ؤچetniؤچkom vojvodi Momؤچilu ؤگujiؤ‡u, ratnom zloؤچincu iz Drugog svjetskog rata.

Snimak je navodno nastao prije pet godina u Chicagu.

- Nakon liturgije bio je ruؤچak i zabava, rekao sam Voji Bilbiji da otpjeva "naإ،u pjesmu", misleؤ‡i na "Tamo daleko". On je poؤچeo pjevati pjesmu koju i ne znam i nekako sam pjevuإ،io za njima, malo iznenaؤ‘en إ،to nije zapjevao onu koju sam mislio, pa sam u jednom trenutku i zaإ،utio - pravdao se Porfirije u hrvatskim medijima rekavإ،i da je zaإ،utio kada se pjevalo o "kokardi vojvode ؤگujiؤ‡a".

- إ ta se ono na Dinari sjaji, ؤگujiؤ‡eva kokarda na glavi - kaإ¾e sporni stih, a teإ،ko je procijeniti je li Porfirije zaista, kako tvrdi, prestao pjevati.

snippet.title: Yemin 317. Bأ¶lأ¼m | The Promise Season 3 Episode 317
snippet.description:
Yemin 317. Bأ¶lأ¼m أ–zeti:

Feride Emirâ€™i affedemiyordur. Emir ise artؤ±k bir إںeyleri dأ¼zeltmeye أ§alؤ±إںmaktan vazgeأ§er. أ–te yandan Cavidan أ¶lmek أ¼zeredir. Feride bأ¼yأ¼k korku iأ§indedir. Emir ise her ne kadar annesine أ¶fkeli olsa da onu bulmaya أ§alؤ±إںؤ±r. Bu sؤ±rada bir kadؤ±n cesedi bulunur ve eإںkal Cavidanâ€™a benzemektedir. Feride ile Emir teإںhis iأ§in أ§aؤںrؤ±ldؤ±klarؤ±nda bأ¼yأ¼k إںok yaإںarlar. Cavidan أ¶ldأ¼ mأ¼? Narin ile Kemalâ€™in mutluluklarؤ± eve gelen isimsiz mektup ile yarؤ±m kalmؤ±إںtؤ±r. Kemal, mektupta yazan إںeylerden sonra أ§ؤ±lgؤ±na dأ¶ner. Narin ise sakin kalؤ±p, Kemalâ€™i de sakinleإںtirmeye أ§alؤ±إںؤ±r ama bu hiأ§ kolay deؤںildir. Kؤ±zؤ± Masalâ€™a hayatؤ±nؤ± adamؤ±n Kemal iأ§in mektupta yazanlar hiأ§ de kolay hazmedilecek إںeyler deؤںildir. Gerأ§ekten Masal Kemalâ€™in kؤ±zؤ± mؤ±?


Abone olun / Subscribe / Suscrأ­bete: https://bit.ly/2VWzKrR

When Mr Hikmet is given a terminal diagnosis he wonders what will become of the fortune he has worked so hard to amass - he can't leave everything to his frivolous son Emir. He travels to see Reyhan, the daughter of an old family friend. She is a kind and caring girl and Hikmet has her promise to marry Emir, securing a stable future for the family. But Emir makes his own promise - to punish his father for controlling his life he will treat Reyhan so badly that she is forced to leave him.

snippet.title: Perseverance Roverâ€™s Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: Plazma torta sa milka ؤچokoladom, pojela se odmah pa sam ponovo pravila da bih vam uslikala presek.
snippet.description:
Nisam se nadala da ؤ‡e u roku od pola sata ,,nestati"ove torte i da ؤ‡u ostati bez preseka i slike (a bez toga vam ne mogu pustiti recept)..tako da sam je opet pravila, إ،to je mojima savrإ،eno odgovaralo :)
Torta sa plazma keksom, milka ؤچokoladom i leإ،nicima. Odmah se pojela bez obzira إ،to spada u one torte kojih je dovoljno jedno parؤچe. Korice su lagane od belanaca (nisu suإ،ene) i plazma keksa.
#milkatorta #plazmatorta #roؤ‘endansketorte

torte sa korama
Recepte moإ¾ete ؤچitati na blogu: http://www.serpica.net/2021/02/plazma-torta-sa-milka-cokoladom.html


Sastojci i priprema:
Kora:

- 5 belanaca
- 5 kaإ،ika إ،eؤ‡era
- 1,5 kaإ،ika braإ،na
- 5 kaإ،ika mlevene plazme

3 - 4 kaإ،ike vode ili mleka za prelivanje peؤچenih kora

Prave se ovakve 3 kore.

Umutiti belanca i إ،eؤ‡er u ؤچvrst sneg. Umeإ،ati braإ،no i plazmu. Peؤ‡i u zagrejanoj rerni na 180 stepeni do 20 minuta. Peؤچene kore premazati vodom ili mlekom, 3-4 kaإ،ike je dovoljno.

- 15 إ¾umanaca
- 150 gr. إ،eؤ‡era
- 200 gr. maslaca ili margarina
- 100 gr. crne milka ؤچokolade
- 100 gr. bele milka ؤچokolade
- 200 gr. mlevene plazme
- 100 gr. mlevenih leإ،nika (lepإ،e ako su predhodno peؤچeni)
- 300 ml. slatke pavlake

Umutiti إ¾umanca sa إ،eؤ‡erom i kuvati na pari uz neprestano meإ،anje, oko 10 minuta.
Ostaviti da se ohladi. Za to vreme rastopiti ؤچokolade, umutiti maslac i slatku pavlaku.
U fil mikserom umeإ،ati maslac i ؤچetiri pune kaإ،ike slatke pavlake.
Umeإ،ati leإ،nike i plazma keks. Podeliti fil na dva dela, u jedna deo staviti rastopljenu tamnu ؤچokoladu u drugi deo rastopljenu belu ؤچokoladu.

Na tacnu staviti kalup i u njemu filovati tortu.
Kora, tamniji fil, slatka pavlaka, kora, svetliji fil, slatka pavlaka, kora. Odozgo izmeإ،ati ostatake filova, uvek ostavim kaإ،iku-dve fila i malo slatke pavlake. To mi bude fil s kojim premaإ¾em treؤ‡u koru.

localized.title: Plazma torta sa milka ؤچokoladom, pojela se odmah pa sam ponovo pravila da bih vam uslikala presek.
localized.description:
Nisam se nadala da ؤ‡e u roku od pola sata ,,nestati"ove torte i da ؤ‡u ostati bez preseka i slike (a bez toga vam ne mogu pustiti recept)..tako da sam je opet pravila, إ،to je mojima savrإ،eno odgovaralo :)
Torta sa plazma keksom, milka ؤچokoladom i leإ،nicima. Odmah se pojela bez obzira إ،to spada u one torte kojih je dovoljno jedno parؤچe. Korice su lagane od belanaca (nisu suإ،ene) i plazma keksa.
#milkatorta #plazmatorta #roؤ‘endansketorte
sveؤچane torte
torte sa korama
Recepte moإ¾ete ؤچitati na blogu: http://www.serpica.net/2021/02/plazma-torta-sa-milka-cokoladom.html


Sastojci i priprema:
Kora:

- 5 belanaca
- 5 kaإ،ika إ،eؤ‡era
- 1,5 kaإ،ika braإ،na
- 5 kaإ،ika mlevene plazme

3 - 4 kaإ،ike vode ili mleka za prelivanje peؤچenih kora

Prave se ovakve 3 kore.

Umutiti belanca i إ،eؤ‡er u ؤچvrst sneg. Umeإ،ati braإ،no i plazmu. Peؤ‡i u zagrejanoj rerni na 180 stepeni do 20 minuta. Peؤچene kore premazati vodom ili mlekom, 3-4 kaإ،ike je dovoljno.

Fil:

- 15 إ¾umanaca
- 150 gr. إ،eؤ‡era
- 200 gr. maslaca ili margarina
- 100 gr. crne milka ؤچokolade
- 100 gr. bele milka ؤچokolade
- 200 gr. mlevene plazme
- 100 gr. mlevenih leإ،nika (lepإ،e ako su predhodno peؤچeni)
- 300 ml. slatke pavlake

Umutiti إ¾umanca sa إ،eؤ‡erom i kuvati na pari uz neprestano meإ،anje, oko 10 minuta.
Ostaviti da se ohladi. Za to vreme rastopiti ؤچokolade, umutiti maslac i slatku pavlaku.
U fil mikserom umeإ،ati maslac i ؤچetiri pune kaإ،ike slatke pavlake.
Umeإ،ati leإ،nike i plazma keks. Podeliti fil na dva dela, u jedna deo staviti rastopljenu tamnu ؤچokoladu u drugi deo rastopljenu belu ؤچokoladu.

Na tacnu staviti kalup i u njemu filovati tortu.
Kora, tamniji fil, slatka pavlaka, kora, svetliji fil, slatka pavlaka, kora. Odozgo izmeإ،ati ostatake filova, uvek ostavim kaإ،iku-dve fila i malo slatke pavlake. To mi bude fil s kojim premaإ¾em treؤ‡u koru. 
Moإ¾ete ukrasiti إ،lagom ili rastopljenom ؤچokoladom.
Torta mora da odstoji jedna dan u friإ¾ideru pa tek onda seؤ‡i i posluإ¾iti.
Prijatno!

en.title: Cake with milk chocolate and ground biscuits, the best cake ever!
en.description:
#cake #chocolate #recipes
Ingredients and preparation:

Biscuit:
- 5 egg whites
- 5 tablespoons of sugar
- 1.5 tablespoons of flour
- 5 tablespoons ground biscuits

3-4 tablespoons of water or milk for topping baked biscuits

Prepare three biscuits.

Whisk egg whites and sugar. Stir in flour and ground biscuits. Bake in a preheated oven at 180 degrees for up to 20 minutes. Coat the baked biscuits with water or milk, 3-4 tablespoons is enough.

Cream:

- 15 egg yolks
- 150 gr. sugar
- 200 gr. butter or margarine
- 100 gr. dark milka chocolate
- 100 gr. white milk chocolate
- 200 gr. ground biscuits
- 100 gr. hazelnuts (better if pre-baked)
- 300 ml. whipped cream

Whisk the egg yolks with the sugar and cook on a steamer with a constant question, about 10 minutes.
Allow to cool. Meanwhile, melt the chocolate, whisk the butter. Whip the whipped cream.
Add 4 tablespoons of whipped cream to the filling, whisk.
Stir in hazelnuts and biscuits. Divide the filling into two parts, put melted dark chocolate in one part and melted white chocolate in the other part.

Fill the cake.
Biscuit, darker filling, whipped cream, biscuit, lighter filling, whipped cream, crust. Mix the rest of the fillings on top, I always leave a spoonful or two of filling and a little sweet sour cream. This is my filling with which I coat the third biscuit.
You can decorate with whipped cream or melted chocolate.
The cake must stand for one day in the refrigerator, cut and serve.
Enjoy !

snippet.title: INTERVJU: Zoran Brankoviؤ‡ - Velja Nevolja je dokaz da je viteإ،tvo nestalo sa asfalta! (26.2.2021)
snippet.description:
Gost emisije "Intervju" bio je Zoran Lepi Brankoviؤ‡, momak sa voإ¾dovaؤچkog asfalta i legenda devedesetih. Videvإ،i svoj uzor u starijima poput ؤگorؤ‘a Boإ¾oviؤ‡a Giإ،ke, uz svoju braؤ‡u Rukija i Saإ،u, prijatelje Aleksandra Kneإ¾eviؤ‡a Kneleta, Kristijana Goluboviؤ‡a, Bojana Banoviؤ‡a i ostale odrastao je u vremenima vrelog beogradskog asfalta. Poznavao je إ½eljka Raإ¾natoviؤ‡a Arkana, Sredoja إ ljukiؤ‡a إ ljuku, Zorana Uskokoviؤ‡a Skoleta, Radeta ؤ†aldoviؤ‡a ؤ†entu i mnoge druge koji su otiإ،li u legendu. Godine provedene u zatvorima i meci koji su ga pogaؤ‘ali nisu uspeli da ga pokolebaju. Samo je postao jaؤچi i odluؤچniji da zauvek saؤچuva status ؤچoveka koji se niؤچega ne plaإ،i. Upravo zbog svoje odluؤچnosti nije saؤچekao da mu istekne zatvorska kazna koju sluإ¾i, veؤ‡ je reإ،io da s "nanogicom" objasni zbog ؤچega su devedesete bile opasno vreme i zaإ،to njihov duh i daje provejava beogradskim ulicama. Preporuؤچujemo Vam da pogledate ceo intervju i saznate viإ،e o brojnim zanimljivim temama.

Intervju je snimljen 19.02.2021. godine u naإ،im prostorijama, u Beogradu. Emisiju je vodio novinar Aleksandar Pavkoviؤ‡.
